steps.title: Convert time and set up the system
steps.content:
Convert 16 hours to minutes: $16 \times 60 = 960$ minutes.

Let $f$ = minutes with fence and $n$ = minutes without fence. From the problem:
$$f + n = 960$$
$$1.08f + 0.62n = 802.20$$

steps.title: Solve using substitution
steps.content:
From the time equation: $n = 960 - f$.

Substitute into the revenue equation:
$$1.08f + 0.62(960 - f) = 802.20$$
$$1.08f + 595.20 - 0.62f = 802.20$$
$$0.46f = 207.00$$
$$f = \frac{207.00}{0.46} = 450$$
Mateo spends 450 minutes mowing lawns with a fence.
